request.description: Authenticates and returns a Bearer JWT token valid for 12 hours. Token is auto-saved for all other requests.
Creates a new order with 3 vehicles across 2 locations (Pune + Nagpur). tracking_id is auto-saved to {{tracking_id}}.
Returns stage-wise tracking info. Uses {{tracking_id}} auto-saved from Order Creation.
Updates the SPOC for the order. Uses {{tracking_id}} auto-saved from Order Creation.
